title: Prediction: These Could Be the Best-Performing Cannabis Stocks Through 2030
text: Green Thumb Industries is considered one of two companies that can produce sector-beating returns for shareholders over the next few years. Green Thumb Industries is a rare example of a profitable cannabis operator that has also maintained a steady growth rate on the top line. The company has achieved something remarkable in an industry known for burning cash—it's actually profitable, with consistent GAAP net income while generating strong operational cash flow. US cannabis prospects look set to improve in 2026 on the back of renewed focus on rescheduling from the Trump administration. Green Thumb Industries is trading at cheap multiples compared to fair value estimates, setting them up for price jumps once regulatory wins hit. Among the major cannabis operators, Green Thumb stands out for its ability to generate consistent profits and positive cash flow while expanding operations. The company's footprint across 14 states and over 100 retail locations positions it well to capitalize on any regulatory improvements at the federal level.
